headline_question: Does a broad matched-scope system materially reduce the strict gap, and which TDC components move the residual most when removed?

takeaways: This audit separates direct baseline-shock responses of the TDC building blocks from residual shifts created by removing whole treatment legs.
Use the direct component responses to see which TDC pieces move with the baseline shock, and use the variant-removal diagnostics to see which omitted legs actually change the residual most.

Quarter-level construction alignment is exact for the public-component reconstruction and all currently audited implied legs, so the remaining issue is dynamic interpretation rather than arithmetic mismatch.
At h0, the largest signed direct component contribution comes from `treasury_operating_cash_drain`.
At h0, removing Treasury operating cash from the treatment shifts the residual by about 51.71.
At h0, removing only ROW shifts the residual by about 19.97, while removing only foreign bank-sector Treasury legs shifts it by about -0.17.
At h0, the combined signed point contribution from foreign bank-sector Treasury legs is about -0.41 in the direct component read.

This artifact compares two matched-scope system reads rather than adding another narrow sensitivity: the current U.S.-chartered matched-bank-leg comparison and a broad-bank matched system built on broad-bank deposits plus a broad loan-led strict core.

The broad matched system keeps the broad headline TDC object and matches it to a broad-bank deposit outcome plus a broad loans-only strict core, rather than trying to force the current U.S.-chartered outcome to absorb the broader treatment.
At h0, the broad matched-scope system leaves about 0.81 of the broad non-TDC residual in the broad strict gap.
Compared with the U.S.-chartered matched-bank-leg read, the broad matched-scope strict gap is smaller at h0 (0.81 versus 0.92).
At h0, the largest treatment-side residual shift in the component audit comes from `no_toc_bank_only`, with an absolute change of about 51.71.
At h0, removing only ROW changes the headline residual by about 19.97, while removing only foreign bank-sector Treasury legs changes it by about -0.17.
